sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung a i Pa in a hong itna
Hong piak Lai Siangtho sungah hong gen ta
Lai Siangtho
sungah thu a ngaih pha pen
Jesuh in kei hong itna mah hi pen

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Jesuh’n hong
it man ka nuam pha hi
Kei hong it hi, kei hong it hi
Jesuh’n hong it man ka nuam pha
hi
Kei nangawn hong it hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amah mangngilh-in ka taisan hangin,
Hong it
lailai hi, ka mangthang hangin;
Zeisu in hong it ke’n ka phawkkik a,
Ama ang sung ka delhkik
vingveng ta.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A phatna teng tawh a mai ka muh teh
La khat bek sa thei ding hong kici
leh
Bang la ka sa zaw diam hih lo a dang
Jesuh in kei hong it pian dang lua
sa’ng.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh’n hong it a kei zong ka it hi
Ka kha hehpih in tan ding hong
kum hi
Hong it man in Singlamteh tung si a
Tua a hih ciang hong it takpi
hita.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Nang na gen thei ding hiam? hong kici leh,
Zeisuh’ minthanna ka gen thei
pah hi;
Kha Siangtho in zong hong thukimpih a,
Hong gen tawntung hi, Zeisuh hong
itna.

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Hih thu ka tel manin ka lungnuam pah,
Zeisuh ka muan manin thupha ka
ngah;
“Zeisuh in hong it hi” ciman peuh leng,
Ka kiang pan Satan taikhia pah vingveng.
